title: AICatalogManifest
description: JSON Schema for the ai-catalog.json capability manifest, defining how AI artifacts are advertised.

specVersion.description: Version of the ai-catalog specification used in this manifest.

host.description: Information about the catalog publisher or hosting entity.

identifier.description: Cryptographic or verifiable identifier of the host (e.g. did:web:domain.com).

logoUrl.description: URL to the publisher's logo image.

entries.description: List of AI agent or capability catalog entries.

catalogEntry.description: A single AI capability entry within the catalog.

identifier.description: RFC 8141-compliant unique logical URN formatted as: urn:ai:<publisher>:<namespace>:<agent-name>

type.description: IANA Media Type indicating the specific protocol wrapper or payload structure (e.g. application/mcp-server+json).

url.description: HTTP URL reference to retrieve the full artifact document.

data.description: Embedded JSON object containing the complete artifact specification inline.

description.description: Brief natural-language description of the capability.

tags.description: Tags or keywords for basic categorizing and filtering.

capabilities.description: Explicit high-performance indexing tags representing skills, tools, or functions (e.g. ['WeatherTool', 'ForecastTool']).

representativeQueries.description: Representative natural-language search queries used for indexing and vector embedding generation.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for custom extensions.

trustManifest.description: Zero-trust security, identity, and compliance envelope metadata.

identity.description: Globally unique cryptographic workload identifier principal (e.g. SPIFFE ID or DID URI).

identityType.description: Hint representing the cryptographic format of the identity.

attestations.description: List of verifiable claims (SOC 2 audits, compliance statements, HIPAA checks).

uri.description: Location of the attestation certificate or document.

mediaType.description: Format of the attestation document (e.g. application/pdf, text/html).

digest.description: Cryptographic sha256 digest for document integrity verification.

provenance.description: Cryptographic lineage trail of the artifact.

signature.description: Detached JWS signature generated over the fields of the trustManifest.
